title: Charm Drag-And-Drop shulker fix
description: Allows Reinforced Shulkers to be used up to their max capacity in Charm's drag and drop shulker feature
body: This is a very simple mod to improve the behavior of Charm's drag and drop shulker module. The module's normal behavior with any shulker, be it modded or not, is to use the vanilla shulker box's container size, even if a modded shulker, in this case a shulker from Reinforced Shulkers, has a larger size than a vanilla shulker box. This mod patches that to make it so that, at least a Reinforced Shulker, can be used to it's full capacity with the module. As always, if you have any questions, comments, or feature requests, you can contact me through github or Discord(gamma_02#5181).
